# 3DDFA-V3 official-like Windows environment
# Python: 3.8
# Windows verified torch stack from 3DDFA-V3 README:
#   torch==1.10.0+cu102
#   torchvision==0.11.0+cu102
#
# Install:
#   uv venv .venv-3ddfa --python 3.8
#   .venv-3ddfa\Scripts\activate
#   uv pip install -r env\requirements-3ddfa-official-py38-cu102-win.txt

-f https://download.pytorch.org/whl/torch_stable.html

torchaudio==0.10.0+cu113
